allow: Bash(venv/bin/python -c "from xrpl.models.transactions import Payment; import inspect; print\(inspect.getfile\(Payment\)\)")
Bash(venv/bin/python -c "from xrpl.models import Memo, MemoWrapper; print\('OK'\)")
Bash(venv/bin/python -c "from xrpl.models import Memo; print\('OK'\)" && venv/bin/python -c "import xrpl.models.transactions as t; print\(dir\(t\)\)")

Bash(venv/bin/python - <<'EOF'
from xrpl.clients import WebsocketClient
from xrpl.models.requests import AccountLines, AccountInfo
from accounts import load_accounts

TESTNET_URL = "wss://s.altnet.rippletest.net:51233"
accounts = load_accounts\(\)

with WebsocketClient\(TESTNET_URL\) as client:
    for key, entry in accounts.items\(\):
        addr = entry["address"]
        label = entry["label"]
        resp = client.request\(AccountLines\(account=addr\)\)
        lines = resp.result.get\("lines", []\)
        print\(f"\\n{label} \({addr}\)"\)
        if not lines:
            print\("  No trust lines"\)
        for line in lines:
            print\(f"  currency={line['currency']}  balance={line['balance']}  limit={line['limit']}  account={line['account']}"\)
EOF)

from app import app
with app.test_request_context\('/'\):
    from flask import url_for
    checks = [
        \('issuance',                  url_for\('issuance'\)\),
        \('issuance_setup_trustline',  url_for\('issuance_setup_trustline'\)\),
        \('issuance_issue',            url_for\('issuance_issue'\)\),
        \('issuance_redeem',           url_for\('issuance_redeem'\)\),
        \('reserve_governance',        url_for\('reserve_governance'\)\),
        \('clearing',                  url_for\('clearing'\)\),
        \('dashboard',                 url_for\('dashboard'\)\),
    ]
    for name, path in checks:
        print\(f'  {name:<32s} -> {path}'\)
print\('All url_for calls resolved correctly.'\)
" 2>&1)
